entry.title: Re: SAP SuccessFactors – Scrambling Framework via Integration Center
entry.content:
It's a very informative blog.
Thanks for making SAP easy to everyone.😊

entry.title: Is it possible to make SAP Ariba email notifications be treated as internal emails for our client?
entry.content:
Our client has raised a question of the email notifications they receive from SAP Ariba can be treated as internal instead of external by removing the label "External"? Is it possible to make SAP Ariba email notifications be treated as internal emails for our client? Is this achievable through DMARC and how can this be accomplished?

#DMARC

entry.title: Re: Connected Workarea Server not reachable
entry.content: Hi Shane, The connected work area was setup and working fine till yesterday. This issue showed all of a sudden. If it was a network issue, then the first creation of Connected workarea itself might have failed. Any pointers on where to check relevant logs to identify the root cause?

entry.title: Re: Automatic clearing of bank interim account for outgoi...
entry.content:
Hi HolleBolle,

 

actually, this is how algorithm 019 works. If you execute it within our fiori app reprocess bank statement item, we use in the background a fallback logic to also check for the DME reference in the memoline. This is never used, when you run the 019 in a posting rule. It will check only in the field CHECK, memo line is ignored. This is also mentioned in the official documentation on the help portal.

 

Btw if you would upgrade to OP2023 FPS 2 the scope item 4X8 becomes for free, you can read on my latest blog post: https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/future-of-electronic-bank-statement-processing-in-sap-s-4hana-public-cloud/ba-p/13705172

 

Only the algorithm 419, will use the "fallback logic" to also check in the memoline for a DME reference.

Best,

Edrilan

entry.title: Re: Install SSL Certificate for Fiori UI5
entry.content:
In our environment, we used the guide below to install a HTTPs certificate. It even explains how you can get a certificate for free. But you can use also your own one if you have one. 

https://www.sap.com/documents/2020/06/109b1be0-9e7d-0010-87a3-c30de2ffd8ff.html

I'm not 100% sure but the configuration for the redirect to https should be also included in those settings.

entry.title: A Forwarding Agent should be treated as Goods recipient
entry.content: Hello everyone. I am facing an issue related to the VA02 transaction. I need the route to be recalculated whenever there is a Forwarding Agent in an order. To achieve this, I inserted code in the route calculation user-exit EXIT_SAPL0VRF_001 to recalculate the route if a Forwarding Agent exists. This has worked when the order had a default Forwarding Agent associated. However, if the Forwarding Agent was not previously present and is added later in the order, the route is not recalculated. I have been investigating, and to trigger the recalculation when the Forwarding Agent is added, it should be configured as a "Goods recipient" (something I am not sure is possible). I have found the configuration table TPACHECKASSIGN. In this table, I observed the roles and function assignments for Partners. I also found the VOPAN transaction, but I am not sure how to proceed. Does anyone know if this type of configuration is possible and how it should be done while adhering to SAP standards as much as possible? I look forward to your response. Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Automatically Inactivate a Learning Item on a Future...
entry.content:
I am not aware of any way to 'schedule' something to inactivate an item on a future date (maybe something connector wise could accomplish that?), that said - you could remove the item from the library a future date.

This would prevent the user from being able to search for the item at all - which, if I understand the issue correctly, would solve for the user finding the course but not seeing any sessions. They would just not find the course anymore.

 

I'd love to hear others thoughts on it!

entry.title: Re: New Down Payment Request approval process in sap byd
entry.content: Dear Alain , thanks for your reply

entry.title: SFTP Connection Issue
entry.content:
Hello,

            When I connect to SF source to target SFTP. I am getting this error org.apache.camel.component.file.GenericFileOperationFailedException: Cannot connect to sap-sftp://farabipetr-dev@sftp23.sapsf.com:22, cause: com.jcraft.jsch.JSchAlgoNegoFailException: Algorithm negotiation fail: algorithmName="server_host_key" jschProposal="rsa-sha2-512,rsa-sha2-256,ecdsa-sha2-nistp256,ecdsa-sha2-nistp384,ecdsa-sha2-nistp521" serverProposal="ssh-rsa" how to resolve it ?

I just updated my blog post, the features will be available and for free with OP2023 FPS2 upgrade.

Edrilan Berisha

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Financials Development

entry.title: Re: Error is: No component exists with the name "FOR".
entry.content: thank you! now I know the reason why REDUCE worked.

entry.title: SAP Digital Manufacturing's Real-Time Monitoring View new capability in REO
entry.content:
Introduction

In any manufacturing operation, every production minute counts and the consequences of any delays can heavily disrupt the production schedule, creating a cascade of undesired consequences.

Understanding the value of real-time information to mitigate those risks, SAP Digital Manufacturing recently introduced a brand new capability called 'Real-Time Monitoring View' as part of Resource Orchestration (REO) in 24.05 Release.

In this blog post, I will briefly discuss Real-Time Monitoring View capability and guide you a quick demo.

Real-Time Monitoring View

In any factory floor, everyone´s goal is to produce smoothly and deliver on time and quality. But as a friend of mine always say 'When man plans, god laughs', and having real-time information handy is most probably one of the biggest diferentiators between falling behind and insight-to-action and reacting in time.

At its core, the brand new Real-Time Monitoring View capability enables users to track production schedules and order executions in real-time.

Supervisors no longer need to rely on outdated (paper?) reports or guesswork. With a few clicks, they can gain immediate insights into the progress of their orders and operations, identify potential backlogs, and take proactive measures to mitigate any risks.

Some key functionalities of the Real-Time Monitoring View are:

Real-Time Status Updates
Imagine a scenario where a high prio order is behind schedule. With real-time status updates, supervisors can easily intervene, reallocating resources or adjusting schedules to ensure timely delivery. This proactive approach minimizes disruptions and maintains customer satisfaction.

Shift Planning and Workforce Attendance
Effective workforce management is crucial for optimal productivity. Resource Orchestration (REO) provides out of the box Tools, Labor, Skills and Shift planning capabilities, and now the new Real-Time Monitoring View capability provides detailed information on shift plans and workforce attendance in a central place and in real-time, empowering supervisors to optimize staffing levels and allocate resources efficiently. By monitoring workforce availability and skills in real-time, supervisors can avoid understaffing issues that could disrupt production.

Preventing Potential Backlogs
Even the smallest delay in production can cascade into a backlog if left unattended. The new Real-Time Monitoring View capability includes a feature to identify potential backlogs in order execution. By noticing these bottlenecks early on, supervisors can take corrective actions to keep operations running smoothly, preventing costly delays and maintaining efficiency.

In addition, the new Real-Time Monitoring View capability offers synchronized data representation based on the plant's time zone. This ensures that users receive accurate and consistent information regardless of their location, facilitating seamless collaboration and decision-making across distributed teams.

Demo

Now, let´s see a quick demo:

Experiencing SAP Digital Manufacturing

You can have a glimpse and experience several aspects of SAP Digital Manufacturing via the Interactive Value Journeys below:

SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights
Discrete Manufacturing in Private Cloud, powered by SAP
Discrete Manufacturing in Public Cloud, powered by SAP
Process Industry Manufacturing with SAP Digital Manufacturing
AI-driven Visual Inspection powered by SAP

Do you like this post? Please let me know in the comments section what you think. Any feedback is highly appreciated.

Or, if you have any questions, please check SAP Community Q&A Area, or comment down below.

Thanks,
Manoel Costa

entry.title: Re: Install SSL Certificate for Fiori UI5
entry.content: Thanks my friend, I will read it in details but just a question. It is for S4/HANA not for ECC. Did you do it on ECC 6 or S4/HANA?

entry.title: Invalid datetime value when using Python Script in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I am still relatively new to the Datasphere and am currently familiarizing myself with Python scripts for data transformation. I am encountering a problem in the mapping, which does not occur without a Python script with pure mapping of field in Datasphere.

My source has 56 fields, which should be extended by 2 additional calculated fields. If I write the data 1:1 (without script) into a target table, the data transformation works. As soon as the script is inserted and the data are passed through the script, the following error message appears:

 

I cannot identify from the error message which column is causing the problem. Is there any way to identify it, or do I have to extend the dataflow column by column and deploy and run the script again and again to determine which column is causing the error?

entry.title: Re: Runtime error(short dump) in ALV report while entering MTART
entry.content: This question has been asked many times in the forum. I suggest that you search the Web e.g. "DBSQL_REDIRECT_INCONSISTENCY" site:sap.com

entry.title: Re: Controlling Search Fucntionality in Learning
entry.content:
As I understand it, the search uses something entitled a 'fuzzy' search where it uses a algorithm to find strings that match patterns 'approximately'. It is helpful for when users do not 'exactly' what they are looking for. For example, if the searcher spells something incorrectly - a fuzzy search would potentially still give the result the user is looking for. 

There is a configuration in the 'Search' config that allows you a bit of control over how fuzzy or specific you want the search to behave. Ours is set at 0.7 - this would mean that the system would return any results that match greater than 70% of what was entered. Increasing the percentage would reduce the matches found, reducing the percentage would increase the matches found.

I am not sure I would recommend adjusting the fuzzy search index without pretty heavy testing on your part to ensure it doesnt end up hurting the end users experience.

That said - something we did to help our end users with specific searches, was to create custom tiles with links to keyword less searches of our different sources (you could put in other criteria as well to meet your specific business need). This gave our users a shortcut to the searches we really felt they would benefit the most from and doesnt require them to know how to search for it. They just click the tile.

Another functionality I have not tested or played with, but that may serve your needs, is the search tier/weight of that item within the library. Library Search Results Booster | SAP Help Portal

 

Good Luck!

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management - Expose Integration Flow Endpoint...
entry.content: Thanks. I was able to see the debug steps. But when I select them I was seeing only headers and properties. But couldn't find any payload there. Am I missing anything? How do I know which step is start and which is end?

entry.title: IAS/IPS - Need help on passwordStatus target transformation
entry.content:
Hi Team,

@Yoganand @ChrisPaine or any other team member who can help me on this:

I am trying to build the code as below where for password status if the login method is PWD and falls in the respective group, it should be enabled, else it should be disabled.

Requirement is - If login method is PWD, then the password status is enabled and if it is SSO or empty it should be disabled. How can we do this in the Target Transformation?

If user is from G1 group - password status disabled.

If user is from G2, G3, G4 group - password status enabled.

Scope: every update.

I've written the transformation as below however i feel it is incorrect.

For G1 Group – Should be disabled.

{

                "targetPath": "$.passwordStatus",

                "condition": "($.loginMethod == 'SSO')",

                "constant": "181fb68d-f959-4747-8929-967fb22c4b54",

                "constant": "disabled",

                "scope": ""

            },

For G2 Group – Should be enabled.

{

                "targetPath": "$.passwordStatus",

                "condition": "($.loginMethod == 'PWD')",

                "constant": "0901d15b-0418-4624-b39f-6c50da7b4a2d",

                "constant": "enabled",

                "scope": ""

            },

For G3 Group – Should be enabled.

{

                "targetPath": "$.passwordStatus",

                "condition": "($.loginMethod == 'PWD')",

                "constant": "2ec92105-3ef3-43fd-b651-defdadff4524",

                "constant": "enabled",

                "scope": ""

            },

For G4 Group – Should be enabled.

{

                "targetPath": "$.passwordStatus",

                "condition": "($.loginMethod == 'PWD')",

                "constant": "65aee695-b017-4ad7-9fcf-54a38ab00320",

                "constant": "enabled",

                "scope": ""

            },

Is there anything simpler than apart from using the groups.

Request you to please help.

Regards,

entry.title: letter of credit - which position management procedure is the relevant one?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I want to activate letter of credit procedure  (product type 85A) in my S/4HANA 1909 system. In the standard customizing the link to accounting needs to be customized. When it comes to the assignment of the position management procedure I am unsecure, which is the right one to take.

In Customizing under Treasury and Risk Management > Transaction Manager > General Settings > Accounting > Settings for Position Management > Assign Position Management Procedure

I have the following options:

1000 SE/Loan: Mark-to-Market (P/L) / Amortization (SAC Net)
1001 Sec./Loan: MtM (P/L)/Amort. SAC Net Separate Position Costs
1010 SE/LO: Mark-to-Market (OCI) / Amortization (SAC Gross)
1020 German HGB: Bond Issue
1030 IAS/IFRS/US GAAP: Bond Issue
2000 SE/LO/MM: Write up to Purchase Value (Without Amort.)
2500 Money Market: Mark-to-Market (FX / P/L)
2501 Money Market: Mark-to-Market (FX / P/L) (Asset)
2502 Money Market: Mark-to-Market (FX / P/L) (Liability)
2600 Money Market: Mark-to-Market ("Security", FX, P/L)
2700 Facility: No Valuation
3000 Derivatives: Hedging Instr., Hedge Acctng (Forex & Sec.Val.)
3001 Forex Trans.: Hedging Instr., Hedge Acctng (Mark-to-Market)
3002 Money Market Transactions: Underlying, Hedge Accounting
3003 Money Market Transactions: Hedging Instr., Hedge Acctng
3004 Forex Trans.: Hedging Instr., Hedge Acctg (Spot/Spot & Swap)
3100 Forward Securities Transactions: Mark-to-Market
3500 Forward Exchange Transactions: Mark-to-Market
3600
4000 Forward Exchange Transactions: Spot/Spot
5000 Index-Linked Bonds: Mark-to-Market (P/L) / Amort. (SAC Net)
6000 Listed Options and Futures: Mark-to-Market
7000 OTC Derivatives: Mark-to-Market
7100 OTC Options: Mark-to-Market (2-Step/OCI)
7200 OTC Options: Mark-to-Market (2-Step/OCI) Transfer Underlying
7300 OTC Derivatives: No Valuation
7315 FLP with Physical Delivery-HGB (Write-up to Purchase Value)

7316 FLP with Physical Delivery-IFRS (Mark to Market)
7317 FLP with no valuation
7400 OTC Deriv.: Mark-to-Market (Asset/Liab. Balance Sheet Accts)
7500 OTC Deriv.: Mark-to-Market (Asset/Liab. Balance Sheet Accts)
8000 Standard Repo
9979 -------Securities/Loans - IAS (Templates)-------
9980 IAS/AFS: Amort. SAC Net / FX Val. (P/L), Sec.Val. (Equ.Cap.)
9981 IAS/AFS: FX Val.(Equity Cap.), Sec.Val.(Equity Cap.)
9983 IAS/TRA: No Amort. / FX (P/L), Security (P/L)
9984 IAS/HTM: Amort. SAC Net / FX Val. Only (P/L)
9985 IAS/HTM: No Amort. / FX Val. Only (P/L)
9986 IAS/AFS: Amort. Const. Eff.Int.Rate /Security (OCI)/FX (P/L)
9989 ------ Securities/Loans - US GAAP (Templates) -------
9990 US/AFS: Amort.SAC Gross / FX Val.(Eq.Cap), Sec.Val.(Equ.Cap)
9991 US/AFS: No Amort. / FX Val. (Equ.Cap), Sec. Val. (Equ.Cap)
9992 US/TRA: Amort. SAC Gross / FX (Equity Cap.), Security (P/L)
9993 US/TRA: No Amort. / FX (Equity Cap.), Security (P/L)
9994 US/HTM: Amort. SAC Gross / FX Val. Only (Equity Cap.)
9995 US/HTM: No Amort. / FX Val. Only (Equity Cap.)
9996 US/AFS: Amort with Delayed Effect.Int./ Sec.(OCI)/Forex(P/L)
9997 US/FASB91: Retrospective Amortization ABS/MBS

Which one is the procedure for letter of credit? How have you solved this in your system?

Thank you for your help,

Peter

entry.title: Re: Runtime error(short dump) in ALV report while entering MTART
entry.content: You are reading directly from MARD instead of the compatibility view NSDM_V_MARD as described in the dump.

entry.title: Re: Usage of Email Addresses in Reporting
entry.content:
Hello,

Good to see the solution to split the personal email address / Business email address

However the reporting solution is covering the employee business email. In our company we have several reports with business email address of the manager. If we use the path with the biographical information the country HR manager will miss employees in the report of the employees with a manager abroad. Will it be possible to deliver a solution without the routing into the biographical information. A direct connection from the supervisor to the business email address? 

Thanks

Mirjam

entry.title: Re: Boosting Procurement Efficiency in 2024 with Ariba Supplier Risk
entry.content: Helpful! Best Wishes @NanditaGhosh

entry.title: Re: SBO_SP_TransactionNotification
entry.content:
if @object_type = ‘112’ and @transaction_type in (N’A’, N’U’)

begin

If exists (select T2.ItemCode From OPOR T1 inner join POR1 T2 on T2.[DocEntry]=T1.[DocEntry]
where (T2.TaxCode is null or T2.TaxCode='' ) and T1.ObjType = 22 and
T2.DocEntry=@list_of_cols_val_tab_del)

Begin

select @error=1,@error_message =’Enter The Tax Code’
End

entry.title: BOM REQUIREMENT
entry.content: We noticed that the bill of materials requirements in a production order were incorrect. It requires more than the required amount. When we checked the main data, additional data and product tree of the material, we saw that the correct quantities were included, but the requirements in the work order do not appear correct. Is there another area I should check? Is there anyone who can help?

entry.title: Re: unable to update INDUSTRYSECTOR for Business partner
entry.content: Try using the BAPI 'BAPI_INDUSTRYSECTOR_ADD'. It did the work for me without any hassles.

entry.title: Re: New MSTeams app home page
entry.content: I've raised this with SAP and they said I was the first to report it and have created this KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/0003471062

entry.title: Digital Assistant availability and cross application needs
entry.content:
With Joule becoming available in more data centres we can expect more customers to start adopting. But what do you think about these questions:

  1. Language support is limited to English only; is this an issue?
  2. There is no fallback option; in case Joule cannot help it will not direct you to a human being or support portal. Is this an issue?
  3. When a company has multiple SAP cloud products they will have multiple Joule's. Each joule lives it's own life. Cross application knowledge can be supported by 3rd party digital assistants, but in SAP each Joule knows about the current system only and cannot provide guidance outside the current box. Is this an issue?

Looking forward to getting some experts to share thoughts!

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - AI Services - Week 4
entry.content: I'm facing the same issue and has also been waiting for 1½ hour now.

entry.title: How to define dependencies between customer exit variables?
entry.content:
Hi everybody, 

I'm trying to implement the new dependency driven processing of variables (ddp) in our SAP BW/4HANA 2023 system as described in SAP note 3144996. I implemented the method IF_RSROA_VARIABLES_EXIT_BADI~GET_DEPENDENCIES in our BADI implementation for the customer exit variables as followed: 

alternative A: 

  method IF_RSROA_VARIABLES_EXIT_BADI~GET_DEPENDENCIES.

    if Sy-UNAME EQ 'MYUSER'.

   c_t_dep_vnam = SWITCH rrs0_t_vnam( i_vnam

    WHEN 'VAR_A'  
       THEN VALUE rrs0_t_vnam( ( 'VAR_B' ) ) ).


   ENDIF.


  endmethod.

alternative b: 

  method IF_RSROA_VARIABLES_EXIT_BADI~GET_DEPENDENCIES.

    if Sy-UNAME EQ 'MYUSER'.

   c_t_dep_vnam = SWITCH rrs0_t_vnam( i_vnam

    WHEN 'VAR_B'  
       THEN VALUE rrs0_t_vnam( ( 'VAR_A' ) ) ).


   ENDIF.


  endmethod.

Both alternatives are basically the same, but the dependency between both variables is reversed. I added a if-statement to check for my user because there are some other developers working on the system and I'm trying not to interfere with their work as long as I'm experementing with this new way. 

As a test scenario, I created a very simple query which contains both variables in the global filter section. Both variables are defined as non-input-ready customer exit variables and are filled by ABAP codding. After changing above mentioned coding, I always generate this query in the transaction RSRT. 

Comparing both alternatives by looking into the variable execution with the debugger, I can see that in both alternatives variable a is being executed before variable b when executing the query in RSRT. I was expecting the variables will be executed in reversed order when I change the dependencies from alternative a to alternative b, but this is not the case. 

What am I missing? 

We're an BW/4HANA 2023 SP0, DW4CORE 400, but implemented the latest SAP notes regarding the issues related to ddp. The parameter "BICS_VAR_VALIDATE_ALWAYS" in table RSADMIN is set to "G", but removing the parameter doesn't change the behavior. While debugging I can see that the method GET_DEPENDENCIES is called and that the table with the dependencies for the variable is filled.  

Any help is appreciated, thanks in advance. 

Regards, 

Marius

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite – Access Policies for Integration Packages
entry.content:
Hello @AndreasMartin, hello @Brandt, thanks for asking!


@AndreasMartin, your understanding is correct. An access policy first defines the group of artifacts to be protected. In a second step, you can grant access to these protected resources by assigning a custom role to dedicated users. In this respect, your feedback is valid, and I will share this with the product team.


Also adding @Brandt: Yes, the fact that you currently need to “protect” integration packages one-by-one (as the Match option doesn’t work for this artifact type) is a known limitation. If you like to influence product development, you can go to the Influence Portal at  (https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#campaign/2282) and create a request for that feature. But the fact that feedback was raised concerning this limitation is already known to the product team.

entry.title: Re: Serial Number Range Customizing in S/4HANA Cloud

It is a nice blog that seems working fine.

Fahrettin

entry.title: Re: Automatically Inactivate a Learning Item on a Future...
entry.content: Marie, I think this works! Yes, the overall goal is to improve the user experience by ensuring the accuracy of what displays as available to the user. It's so confusing to click a link and then see...NOTHING! Thank you for your prompt response.

entry.title: How to output separately based on item-level?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

In professional service, whenever a project is created automatically, a sales order service will be created.

Every after 6 months, one more line item will be added to the project customer reference. When outputting the sales order service, we need to base it only on the latest line item. However, we are now getting all the line items as per standard.

We'd like to know how to output separately based on item-level.

--------------------

Below is more background info:

Suppose client gets the sales order for the year 2024, it will be added as a work package and assigned within the billing element.

For 2025 when they get to renew the same, they will create another work package and link to a second billing element.

We'd like to share the sales order preview with our customer. We are looking for options to get the print preview based on item-wise.

In the professional service customer project, the limitation is: unable to add multiple sales order for the same project. For this reason, we are creating multiple work packages and link to the same sales order.

How to realize the above output requirement?

Thanks and regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to output separately based on item-level?
entry.content:
* To be noticed:

This is not an official responsible approach by SAP to use the output form template.

Please reach out to your local consultants and developers to decide its usage and handle any future issues on it.

-------------------

Below steps are provided as a reference to customize the sales order form template in order to only print the last index item.

0. Prerequisites:

  • Know basic steps to download and upload to replace the standard SAP form template, referring to this blog Customization of Form Template (using Adobe LiveCycle)for production order pick list in Rise with SAP | SAP Blogs .
  • Know the basic operation of Adobe LiveCycle designer.

1. Open the downloaded template in LiveCycle Designer

Click the Hierarchy palette, choose node "tabInnerTable", following the path: Form->bdyMain->frmTableBlock->tblRemarkRowTable->rowItem-> tabInnerTable.

2. Then open the Script Editor (click the "Window" tab and choose "Script Editor") for the chosen node. Select "calculate*" from the dropdown list. Add the below code to realize "only printing the last index item".

    var tblrow = frmTableBlock.tblRemarkRowTable.resolveNodes("rowItem[*]").length - 1;

    if ( $.parent.parent.rowItem[tblrow].tblInnerTable.rowItem.colItem.rawValue <> $.rowItem.colItem.rawValue )

     then

       $.presence = "inactive"

endif;

3. Save the template and then upload it to the S/4HANA Cloud system.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: Electronic Invoicing in Malaysia
entry.content:
@Mervyn @martinlitalin 

 

Hi Mervyn and Martin , Do we any SAP Notes available for creating QR code from SAP to be compliant with the Malaysia E-Invoicing from ECC System?

entry.title: Re: Cloud BAdI replacement for BADI_SLS_HEAD_SCR_CUS?
entry.content:
Thank you. I can able to add the custom fields in VA01 using the custom fields and logic app. I am working on adding logic to ensure that the custom field values update certain values on the payment cards tab of VA01. Could this be possible with the implementation of custom fields logic?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: DTV Essentials: Key details that you should know – Part 1
entry.content:
Hi,

Can you please help me with the backend working of DTV tool and conversion of values in ECC to S4 HANA upgrade.

entry.title: Explain the value status letters for API_BILLING_DOCUMENT_SRV
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We are using this API to get billing info of customer project. 

When using "OverallSDProcessStatus" or "OverallBillingStatus", there is no information about the meaning of the entry letters.

Example:

  • OverallSDProcessStatus: '' (blank)
  • OverallBillingStatus: A

Could you please help?

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Explain the value status letters for API_BILLING_DOCU...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Please find the meaning of the values for the requested fields below:

OverallSDProcessStatus:
'' (blank): Not Relevant
A: Not yet processed
B: Partially processed
C: Completely processed

OverallBillingStatus
'' (blank): Not Relevant
A: Completed
B: To Be Posted
C: Canceled
😧 Incomplete

Please refer to 3472797 - Value status explanation for Billing Document API - SAP S/4HANA Cloud.

Kind regards,

SAP Expert

entry.title: How to connect RF device to sap public cloud CipherLab RK95 Industrial Mobile Computer.
entry.content: Is there any document on RF device connection to public cloud, i would like to connect Cipherlab RK95 android device for WM activities.

entry.title: How to add a new entry in Conversation in Resolve and Dispatch incidents APSS
entry.content:
Hi Support Team
How to add A new entry in Conversation in Resolve and Dispatch Incidents App.
 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to add a new entry in Conversation in Resolve and...
entry.content: If KBA: ##2659496 doesn't fulfill the business requirement, customer needs to involve consulting service for further help. From standard product perspective, those options are fixed.

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - AI Services - Week 4
entry.content: @Hira Can you please provide the landscape and the subaccount ID?

entry.title: Re: Explain the value status letters for API_BILLING_DOCU...
entry.content:
Ignore the emoji regarding to "OverallBillingStatus".

Correct entries:

'' (blank) : Not Relevant
A : Completed
B : To Be Posted
C : Canceled
D : Incomplete

entry.title: Re: Explain the value status letters for API_BILLING_DOCU...
entry.content: Regarding "OverallBillingStatus", last entry is 'D : Incomplete'

entry.title: Re: Editable smartTable - export to excel issue
entry.content:
@appu24 Did you notice the network call when you click on the export to excel button. You might see batch calls triggered for the OData service that reads and export the data. The smart table control has export type property as either GW or UI5 client. Can you try with UI5 client.
https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/api/sap.ui.comp.smarttable.ExportType

If that still triggers odata call to get the data for export then i am afraid you have to write export logic on your own. You can refer to this for custom export. 

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/entity/sap.ui.export.Spreadsheet

entry.title: Re: Asking and Answering Questions in the Community After Migration
entry.content:
@paddyw So far, there is not a single location to see any/all posts. What I've learned is to go to the specific topic page, then to the blog component, and then you should see the draft status. It is a workaround to not having a coherent view of your own content.

Blog post draft counter = "0"

entry.title: Re: How to validate the presence of a mandatory subnode in a RAP BO?
entry.content: I'd say it's a basic scenario with UUIDs where our database tables have one UUID as primary key and in case of the child node there is foreign key to the parent's primary key. E.g. in the root table the primary key field is ROOT_UUID, in the child table the primary key field is CHILD_NAME_UUID (and the foreign key ROOT_UUID is present here as well). The join condition is simply realized via association to parent on $projection.ROOT_UUID = _parentAssoc.ROOT_UUID.

entry.title: I have problems with the Odata service - Error 500
entry.content:
Hello everybody, let me tell you.
I have created a ui5 application that consumes an odata service from an ECC EHP-8 server.
My problem is that from time to time the odata service stops working and gives me a 500 error, but then it fixes itself. That is, it works normally again and my application has data again.
However, this is a bit annoying and I want to fix it.
I attach screenshots from the google console and also from the SAP GUI.
Thank you and have a nice day.

entry.title: Re: SAP workzone UI Integration Component Card
entry.content:
Hello Das

Did you find any solution please?

entry.title: Re: SAP workzone UI Integration Component Card
entry.content: Hello Debashish , I have similar issue , did you find any solution please

entry.title: Re: Object type definition for an outbound IDoc
entry.content: Hi, sorry @Ryan-Crosby, was pretty busy the previous days (and last Monday was a French bank holiday ;)) ; oki, I thought that WE57 was playing a role there, as the object type was defined... since I don't see any user-exit or enhancement spot in the RSNASTED form where the object type is determined (FORM INITIALIZE_WORKFLOW ), I don't see any other possibility than copying the RSNASTED, put in the form where the object type is determined a kind of call to the EDIFCT table to get the object and set the resulting specific program in the processing routines for the output, or do you think of another possibility?

entry.title: Re: Set up SAP Generative AI Hub in an SAP BTP Enterprise Account and Consume Generative AI Model
entry.content:
@tly For typical use cases, finetuning is not required. Instead, the standard approach is to use 'Retrieval Augmented Generation' (RAG), wherein you feed in the relevant data as context as part of the prompt/messages. LLMs use this to answer the query or complete the task. Please note, that SAP HANA has Vector Engine support and vector-search based RAG can be implemented natively within the SAP BTP context. 

Further Reference:
  • SAP HANA + RAG using LangChainJS - link
  • SAP HANA + RAG using LangChain Python - link

entry.title: Re: What is the name of the CDS that contains "Inventory...
entry.content:
Dear AngelaDai and Enda,

Thank you both. Yes, this was what we were looking for...

Thank you and please take care.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: Event Driven Integration with SAP S/4 HANA Cloud using SAP Event Mesh and SAP Integration Suite
entry.content:
We have created an Event Mesh from the SAP S/4HANA public cloud. This Event Mesh is designed to trigger events whenever there is a change in the product master data or when a new product is created.

Despite configuring the Event Mesh to capture these events, we are currently facing an issue where the events are not being received or displayed in the Event Mesh application queue.

We require assistance in diagnosing and resolving this issue to ensure that product-related events are successfully captured and displayed in the Event Mesh queue.

entry.title: SAC Planning: Locking on model dimensions locks "Totals" on a table
entry.content:
Hi All

When manually locking cells on a table in a story, the "Totals" value is still enabled for change - i.e not greyed out and values can be entered at that level - either when using a hierarchy or flat structure and displaying "Totals".  (See pic below showing "Sep" & "Oct" cells locked, but the total value of 1,200 when using hierarchy or flat structure is not greyed out and values can still be entered)

 

However, when enabling dimension locks on the model for "Sep" and "Oct", the values in the table for those months become locked (greyed out) but the "Totals" are now also greyed out and changes can't be made.

Is this by design or am I missing something?

entry.title: Re: How to activate EC Workflows without Employee Central
entry.content:
@rconesa, hi! I tried then, but the workflow objects were not visible in SR. So I used CPI to create additional custom MDF user-based object for the reporting of pending requests. And yes, my users wouldn't have accepted the functionality w/o the report.

Glad that you find the blog of use.

Thanks, Vladimir

entry.title: Re: How to validate the presence of a mandatory subnode in a RAP BO?
entry.content: If the parent key is not part of the child key definition than you cannot apply my proposed coding because of the missing before image of the delete operation.

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP - Document Information Extraction
entry.content:
These scenarios are becoming more important in the B2B world.
Sales and distributors send emails and Excel sheets with sales orders.
Interpreting this data and exporting it as an order to SAP and non-SAP systems will be valuable.

entry.title: Re: Welcome all SAP Community members, start here!
entry.content: Hi SAP community, I am Nina and I hope that we will have nice time here!

entry.title: Re: SFTP Connection Issue
entry.content:
Hi Zubhair,

Check this SAP notes 3359283 and 3079510

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: UI Integration card preview - 404 error for destinations
entry.content: Hello Steve , Did you find any solution please? i have similar issue

entry.title: Central Procurement Approval Workflow based on Accounting Object
entry.content:
Hello,

Currently we have our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Purchase Requisitioning approval flow based on Accounting Object (like Cost Center) which comes as a standard.

We are looking for the possibility to implement Central Procurement to manage multiple  ECCs and S/4HANA On-Premise systems, but it seems like there is no such an option to use Accounting Object for Approval Workflow for Central Purchase Requisition.

Are there any workarounds or plans to implement such function for Central Procurement?

entry.title: Re: How to Retrieve Key Performance Metrics from SAP ASE...
entry.content:
Hey, @Mark_A_Parsons, with the help of your response we are able to fetch the data form sp_monitorconfig within the python script. But we still has some doubt regarding the initial data points that we need. The questions are as follow:

1. In sp_monitorconfig 'all' we need the data point for a particular instance id. Is their any way to fetch the data by instance id. Also, the data points in sp_monitorconfig are for a particular sybase server or instance or cluster? (What is the difference between sybase server and instance. I could not found the proper answer in the documents, maybe you can explain it better.)

2. Does 'max memory' resource in sp_monitorconfig shows the current usage of memory?, because in the sybase document I found that max memory specifies the maximum amount of total physical memory that you can configure SAP ASE to allocate. (Reference Link: https://infocenter.sybase.com/help/index.jsp?topic=/com.sybase.infocenter.dc31654.1600/doc/html/san1360629107517.html)

3. For Heap memory, the sp_monitorconfig is providing the heap memory per user, but we need total heap memory utlization percentage, is it the same? I could not found more details in the sybase document.

Thankyou for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Restricting a filter list with another filter - SAC a...
entry.content:
Hi Deb_, 

   Have you switched on cascading effort on the input controls? If it's on, the input control with member list should only show members which have the property value you specified in another one. 

Best regards, William

entry.title: #Multivalue
entry.content:
I have two queries from two different universes - 

query 1 call it STS has Customer #, Serial #, Order Date and Ship Date

query 2 call it cosmos has Customer #, Serial # and Ship Date

My final report should be Customer #, Serial #, Order Date, Ship Date

I would like to use the Ship Date from STS and Customer #, Serial #, Order Date from cosmos, to use the STS Ship Date I created a Detail variable with merged Customer # as the associated dimension

However this results in #Multivalue error and if I use MAX I get the incorrect Date (from cosmos not sts)

How can I report out the correct date and work around this #multivalue error??

thanks

entry.title: Re: Power designer column font color
entry.content:
You can get to the symbol information a column in a table symbol via TableSymbol.SubObjects - not sure if that'll get you the font style.

If you want to control the default font styles for PK, FK columns etc, I suggest you create a PDM that has the standard display preferences you require, then use it to create a User Profile.

entry.title: Re: Problem with InventoryCountings (B1 Service Layer)
entry.content:
Hi,

I've found the same error, so I compare tables an them are equal, only DataSource is diferent, when we create directly in SAP it works

Do you found the solution for this error?

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: Problem with InventoryCountings (B1 Service Layer)
entry.content: The problem is with POST not with GET.

entry.title: Re: Retail Master Data
entry.content: Hi all, I have the same request. Any news about this issue?

entry.title: Re: May Developer Challenge - AI Services - Week 4
entry.content: @Mikkelj @Hira So sorry that is entirely on me! I mixed up the versions of the executable ID! We want to use the latest version 3 and the ID for that is: 340abda5-d605-452a-bf4c-169249aab362. Please try to start the training again using that executable ID!

entry.title: Re: Unable to connect to S4Cal via eclipse from local desktop
entry.content: Hi Karthick, are you using the S/4HANA Fully-Activated Appliance (or something else) ? What release does your local Eclipse and ADT run ? Please use the newest (or ideally the same release as on the remote desktop). Also, can you use the HANA administration or modeler perspective from your local Eclipse (to single out a problem with ADT only) ? Best, Joerg

entry.title: S4hana Server Installation Error
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I have installed a HANA database, with AFL, and EML and EPM. Now I'm trying to install the Application Server, but I'm encountering this error message. Can anyone help me with this?

I 'm getting this error in swpm:

Error

An error occurred while processing option System SID (SAP S/4HANA 2023) > SAP S/4HANA Server 2023 > SAP HANA Database > Installation > Application Server ABAP > Standard System > Standard System (Last error reported by the step: Error during execution of HdbCmdClazz 'INSTALL_HANA_COMPONENT' : class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.CmdClazzParameterFactory, parameters received. Start execution. Check HdbCmdOut.log and HdbStdout.txt for further information.Use Java process call.Execute command: /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm --action=update_components --batch --read_password_from_stdin=xml --component_root=/usr/sap/SID/HDB00/components --components=sap_afl_sdk_aplCannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)Thu May 23 15:10:46 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Cannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)). You can now:

  • Choose Retry
    to repeat the current step.
  • Choose Log Files
    to get more information about the error.
  • Stop the option and continue later.

Log files are written to /tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP.

HdbCmdOut.log

Start new command section
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.core.jar | Changelist: 211336 | Release: lmts_026_REL | API-Version: 00
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Version of com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.jar | Changelist: 213207 | Release: lmts_026_REL | API-Version: 35
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcDriver | URI: file:/tmp/sapinst_instdir/S4HANA2023/CORE/HDB/INSTALL/STD/ABAP/ngdbc.jar
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Adding connect property: encrypt=true
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Adding connect property: validateCertificate=false
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Instance is a multiple-container system.
Thu May 23 09:22:53 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Start new connection with connect URL: jdbc:sap://hostname:30013/?databaseName=SID connect user: SYSTEM
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.user.password.HdbPassword | Configured password_layout is: A1a, minimum password length: 8
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Name of HdbCmdClazz: class com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent | Updating HANA component(s) locally: sap_afl_sdk_apl
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm | Use Java process call.
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm | Execute command: /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm --action=update_components --batch --read_password_from_stdin=xml --component_root=/usr/sap/SID/HDB00/components --components=sap_afl_sdk_apl
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm | Cannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Error during execution of HdbCmdClazz section!
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | Cannot run /usr/sap/SID/HDB00/../hdblcm/hdblcm - execve failed (ENOENT - No such file or directory)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.operating.system.ExternalProcess.exec(ExternalProcess.java:185)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.operating.system.ExternalProcess.exec(ExternalProcess.java:127)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.operating.system.ExternalProcess.execute(ExternalProcess.java:86)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.HdbLcm.updateComponent(HdbLcm.java:151)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent.installComponentLocally(InstallHanaComponent.java:879)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.utils.cmd.clazz.InstallHanaComponent.execute(InstallHanaComponent.java:857)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain.execute(HdbCmdMain.java:113)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain.main(HdbCmdMain.java:74)
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.sl.lib.connection.sql.JdbcConnection | Closing connection: jdbc:sap://hostname:30013/?databaseName=SID Connect user: SYSTEM
Thu May 23 09:22:54 CEST 2024 | com.sap.hdb.core.main.cmd.HdbCmdMain | *************************************************************

Thank you very much.

Best Regards

entry.title: Re: How to validate the presence of a mandatory subnode in a RAP BO?
entry.content: I see what you mean. In this case, would you recommend adding the parent foreign key field as a second key field in the child entity, even though the current key definition is already unique? Or do you think that the solution to read the parent key of my deleted child entity via the db table, followed by a read by association to my mandatory child via EML is as good? I'm thinking about the potential rework adding the second key could bring, as for e.g. for error messages the %path needs to be filled, and I'm not sure that %tky was used everywhere throughout the whole BO. In your previous reply you mentioned currently there is no before image for RAP runtime, any idea if this is planned for future releases? Many thanks for the assistance!!

entry.title: Inspection Lot Not Generated despite the correct Master Data
entry.content:
Dear All,

Hope you are doing good

Please help to resolve, as our client is using third part tool 3PL with middleware as SAP PI which sends inbound IDOC having purchase order, delivery detail to SAP ECC and it creates GR with movement type: 101.

A month back system was working correctly and now a days we are facing lot of inconsistencies like GR with movement type: 101 is created successfully, but inspection lots are generating sometimes and on other occasions it is not.

We tried to replicate in Quality and it works every time, the master data maintained in both system is exact as well as there is no master data changes w.r.t. to QM done in production system. The solution offered to business is to cancel the GR document with movement type 101 and again perform the GR, users do not want to go with this option and needs a sure shot way where inspection lot is generated every time.

Requesting to share the inputs to rectify this problem. Cannot upload any screenshots due to client server.

Kindly consider.

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Controlling Search Fucntionality in Learning
entry.content: Hi Marie - Just FYI the Library Search Results Booster | SAP Help Portal info shows a NOTE stating it is for legacxy search only and Noy enhanced search - shame about that as that wouldve helped considerably. I will explore your other suggestions thanks that it is only

entry.title: Re: Achieve near real-time reporting of SAP Ariba using the SAP Ariba APIs
entry.content:
Hey,
I would like to know if a solution has been created for this issue so far:

"Unfortunately, there is no mechanism, e.g. webhooks, for an external application/listener to be notified when a particular object has changed in SAP Ariba. For example, receive a notification when a Sourcing Request has been created/updated/deleted."

I currently have a project that needs to receive a message via api (webhooks) informing the creation/change/deleted in relation to PR (requisitions) in ARIBA. I am using the Document Approval API.
Do you have any solution for this need?
SAP Ariba Contracts SAP Ariba Central Procurement

entry.title: Re: SAP SD Configuration in Pricing as per IATA Role
entry.content: Did you try with Scaling in condition records ?

entry.title: SAP ECC EHP7 equivalent MDKP table but for MRP AREA
entry.content:
hello,

MRP AREA is activated in my SAP ECC EHP7. I want to get the list of all last MRP run for my materials but MDKP is no more used ( since MRP activation ).

Do you which table is used for MRP AREA ?

Thanks a lot.

Best regards,

Romeo

entry.title: Re: Controlling Search Fucntionality in Learning
entry.content: Ahh! Good to know! I hadnt yet even dived into that functionality and I guess now I wont have to!

entry.title: SAP Integration - after SOAP request and prepare a retrived PDF the response structure is incorrect
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I apply solution which described @stephen_xue

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/abap-proxy-retrieve-pdf-from-cpi-and-have-it-printed-locally/ba-p/13504044

and generally working (I can download PDF file) but payload's response is not valid with correct structure.

1st payload after request

 

 

?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><tag0:GeneratePrintOutResponse xmlns:tag0="http://tempuri.org/">
  <tag0:GeneratePrintOutResult>
    <__identity xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System" i:nil="true"/>
    <b:_buffer xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System"/>
    <b:_capacity xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">0</b:_capacity>
    <b:_expandable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">true</b:_expandable>
    <b:_exposable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">true</b:_exposable>
    <b:_isOpen xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">true</b:_isOpen>
    <b:_length xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">0</b:_length>
    <b:_origin xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">0</b:_origin>
    <b:_position xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">0</b:_position>
    <b:_writable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">true</b:_writable>
    <a:ErrorList xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System"/>
    <a:PrintDocument xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF" xmlns:i="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System" i:type="b:MemoryStream">
      <__identity i:nil="true"/>
      <b:_buffer xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">
        <xop:Include xmlns:xop="http://www.w3.org/2004/08/xop/include" href="cid:http://tempuri.org/1/638520736892059896"/>
      </b:_buffer>
      <b:_capacity xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">96720</b:_capacity>
      <b:_expandable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">false</b:_expandable>
      <b:_exposable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">false</b:_exposable>
      <b:_isOpen xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">true</b:_isOpen>
      <b:_length xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">96720</b:_length>
      <b:_origin xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">0</b:_origin>
      <b:_position xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">0</b:_position>
      <b:_writable xmlns:b="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">true</b:_writable>
    </a:PrintDocument>
    <a:PrintFormat xmlns:a="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">PDF</a:PrintFormat>
  </tag0:GeneratePrintOutResult>
</tag0:GeneratePrintOutResponse>

 

 

2nd payload after prepare PDF as attachment

 

 

<ns0:SalesOrderCreateResponse xmlns:ns0='urn:yourcompany.com:sapecc:lead2order'>
  <Order />
</ns0:SalesOrderCreateResponse>

 

 

3rd payload - in that structure should be a response

 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<wsdl:definitions targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns:xi0="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays" xmlns:xi1="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System" xmlns:xi2="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns:xi3="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF">
 <wsdl:types>
  <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://tempuri.org/" xmlns="http://tempuri.org/">
   <xsd:import namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF"/>
   <xsd:element name="GeneratePrintOutResponse" nillable="true">
    <xsd:complexType>
     <xsd:sequence>
      <xsd:element name="GeneratePrintOutResult" minOccurs="0" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xi3:PrintOutResponse"/>
     </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:complexType>
   </xsd:element>
  </xsd:schema>
  <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays">
   <xsd:complexType name="ArrayOfstring">
    <xsd:sequence>
     <xsd:element name="string" minOccurs="0" nillable="true" form="qualified" maxOccurs="unbounded" type="xsd:string"/>
    </xsd:sequence>
   </xsd:complexType>
  </xsd:schema>
  <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System">
   <xsd:complexType name="MarshalByRefObject">
    <xsd:sequence>
     <xsd:element name="__identity" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xsd:anyType"/>
    </xsd:sequence>
   </xsd:complexType>
  </xsd:schema>
  <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO">
   <xsd:import namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System"/>
   <xsd:complexType mixed="false" name="MemoryStream">
    <xsd:complexContent>
     <xsd:extension base="Stream">
      <xsd:sequence>
       <xsd:element name="_buffer" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xsd:base64Binary"/>
       <xsd:element name="_capacity" form="qualified" type="xsd:int"/>
       <xsd:element name="_expandable" form="qualified" type="xsd:boolean"/>
       <xsd:element name="_exposable" form="qualified" type="xsd:boolean"/>
       <xsd:element name="_isOpen" form="qualified" type="xsd:boolean"/>
       <xsd:element name="_length" form="qualified" type="xsd:int"/>
       <xsd:element name="_origin" form="qualified" type="xsd:int"/>
       <xsd:element name="_position" form="qualified" type="xsd:int"/>
       <xsd:element name="_writable" form="qualified" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
     </xsd:extension>
    </xsd:complexContent>
   </xsd:complexType>
   <xsd:complexType mixed="false" name="Stream">
    <xsd:complexContent>
     <xsd:extension base="xi1:MarshalByRefObject"/>
    </xsd:complexContent>
   </xsd:complexType>
  </xsd:schema>
  <xsd:schema targetNamespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF" xmlns="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/InterfaceSendOrderWCF">
   <xsd:import namespace="http://schemas.microsoft.com/2003/10/Serialization/Arrays"/>
   <xsd:import namespace="http://schemas.datacontract.org/2004/07/System.IO"/>
   <xsd:complexType mixed="false" name="PrintOutResponse">
    <xsd:complexContent>
     <xsd:extension base="xi2:MemoryStream">
      <xsd:sequence>
       <xsd:element name="ErrorList" minOccurs="0" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xi0:ArrayOfstring"/>
       <xsd:element name="PrintDocument" minOccurs="0" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xi2:Stream"/>
       <xsd:element name="PrintFormat" minOccurs="0" nillable="true" form="qualified" type="xsd:string"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
     </xsd:extension>
    </xsd:complexContent>
   </xsd:complexType>
  </xsd:schema>
 </wsdl:types>
</wsdl:definitions>

 

 

How can I convert, mapping the response body ?

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Fiori tools: How to set Export Type of List Report?
entry.content: Hello @MioYasutake , we have a similar requirement . is there any update on this . Thanks

entry.title: Re: CDC Consent management implementation
entry.content:
Hi @david-avvale ,

Good day.
Taking GDPR into consideration the best practice would be the first option: 
"Having two sites, one per country, under a parent each one with its own consent statement for each country regulation with several locales for language per site."

We have carried out a similar implementation as well.

Regards,
Preethi

@david-avvale

entry.title: Re: Cloud Transport Management Service -getting error whi...
entry.content: Technical user which is used in destionation of Dev and Prod space, was not added in production space memebers.After adding it started working.

entry.title: Re: How to validate the presence of a mandatory subnode in a RAP BO?
entry.content:
Not sure what to recommend. As for the possibility to read the before image of a deleted entity via EML: not on the roadmap. You could open an improvement request to track the progress: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/2911
Last comment: you could also use a precheck to prevent the deletion of the last entity instead of a validation: https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/operation-precheck?version=sap_btp. Still same problem with reading the parent.

entry.title: Re: How to change Asset Depreciation frequency from month...
entry.content:
There is no chance to do this. Depreciation works off 12 months only on the Cloud.
To meet the requirement you could use key MANU and post manually the amount.

entry.title: Re: Partial Invoice - Supplier Side
entry.content:
Hello,

Share this with your supplier- How do I hide a PO?

They can then decide when/what to hide in their account so it doesn't create noise for them.

entry.title: Re: I have problems with the Odata service - Error 500
entry.content:
note: 1322182

basically you have to change abap/shared_objects_size_MB to a bigger value.
